description_long: This is a small brick house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown scalloped shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from weathered red bricks, giving the house a rustic, aged appearance. There is a single, prominent chimney with a worn, red-and-white finish emerging from the roof. The house features a few windows with wooden frames and a single wooden door, all of which have a simple, traditional design. The windows are symmetrically placed on the visible sides, and the door is located on the gable end. The overall structure is compact and evokes the look of a classic European or rural cottage.
description: A compact brick house with a gable roof, scalloped shingles, a chimney, and simple wooden windows and door.
description_view_0: View of the house showing the tiled roof, chimney, and a single window on the brick wall.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the gable roof, chimney, and a window with a wooden frame beneath the roof slope.
description_view_2: Rear view of the house with the roof, chimney barely visible, and a single window on the brick wall.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main wooden door, a window above it, and the gable end of the roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door centered on the gable end, no porch or steps, minimal decorative elements
